---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Create a report to help us improve BOUNDLY"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Define an entity with `#[Entity]`...
2. Run `php artisan core:watch`...
3. See error...

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

```
Paste your error/stack trace here
```

## 🌍 Environment
- **BOUNDLY Version**: [e.g. 0.1.0-alpha]
- **PHP Version**: [e.g. 8.3.2]
- **Laravel Version**: [e.g. 13.1.1]
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Database**: [e.g. MySQL 8.0]

## 📎 Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or code snippets that may help.
